history.summary: Session persistence fixes, lazy database loading, API restructuring, favicon.
changes: Fixed session persistence issue by including credentials in fetch requests
Implemented lazy loading of database module across all route handlers
Fixed SQL syntax for SQLite in reports endpoints (monthly, yearly, total, future)
Changed API URL structure from /api/ to /ALTApi/ for all endpoints
Made index.html the landing page for better user experience
Added SVG favicon to all HTML pages for branded browser tab appearance
Consolidated database connections for improved reliability
Ensured session authentication persists across page navigation

history.summary: Theme system, per-user theme persistence, UI refinements.
changes: 4 colour themes — light-green, light-blue, dark-green, dark-blue with full CSS variable system
Per-user theme persistence — theme saved to database via API, loaded on login
Theme picker with colour swatches in the user status bar
Admin badge (red ADMIN pill) displayed next to admin usernames
Dark mode support with dedicated CSS overrides
Distinctive logout button — solid red background across all themes
About link right-aligned in navigation bar
About page shows only current version with expandable version history toggle

history.summary: UX polish, patient addresses, future payment blocking, date clock, seeded data.
changes: Future appointments cannot be marked as paid — enforced on backend (POST, PUT, PATCH) and frontend
Patient address field — stored per patient, defaults into appointment address, editable per appointment
Google Maps links (📍) next to all address fields across appointments and patient views
User status bar with live clock showing date and time, profile link, and logout button
Patient listing table simplified — removed condition column from table view
Test data seeded — 10 patients with randomised appointments for development
Payment type tracking (Wire, MBWay, Cash, etc.)
Patient comments section with date-tagged notes
Appointment history panel within patient details

history.summary: First tagged release — full multi-user system with role-based access control.
changes: Admin appointment management — admin sees all appointments, filters by therapist, schedules for therapists, edits any appointment and can reassign therapists
Therapist endpoint — new /api/users/therapists for populating therapist dropdowns across the app
Revenue Control therapist filter — admin can filter all revenue sections (total, monthly, future, outstanding) by therapist; non-admin users see only their own data
Report endpoints accept userId parameter — /api/reports/total, /monthly, /yearly and /future all support admin filtering by therapist
Admin-only navigation — Configuration and User Management links hidden from non-admin users via data-admin-only attribute
Settings page access control — non-admin users who navigate directly to /settings.html see Access Denied
Nav hidden before login — main navigation bar and logout button are hidden until authenticated
Simplified role-based UI — single updateNavForRole() function using data-admin-only for all admin elements

history.summary: Multi-user RBAC with block/unblock, user management, profile page.
changes: Multi-user authentication system with username and password (bcrypt)
Role-based access control — admin and therapist roles
User Management page (admin-only) — create, edit, block/unblock users
My Profile page — self-service profile and password changes
Case-insensitive login
Blocked user rejection at login
All pages updated with username+password login forms
Shared common.js with AppCommon utility (login, session, nav role management)
Patient Registry with comments section and appointment history
Revenue Control with total, monthly, future, and outstanding payments
Appointment Management with filters, search, and pagination
Schedule Hub with weekly and monthly calendar views
Configuration page for default fee settings
Payment confirmation dialog
Payment type tracking (Wire, MBWay, Cash, etc.)
